---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a product or developer experience improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Outcome

Describe the ideal improvement.

## Use Case

Who benefits from this and when?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] clear user-facing or developer-facing outcome
- [ ] measurable success condition
- [ ] no hidden dependency or migration risk

## Notes

Add examples, mockups, or edge cases if relevant.
